text: Fundamental strengths support the investment case. Net margin expanded approximately 206 basis points year-over-year to 27.86% in Q3 2025, indicating improved operational efficiency. Cash flow quality appears robust, with free cash flow margin reaching 41.61% in Q1 2025. The balance sheet shows manageable net debt of approximately $3.1 billion despite total debt of $57.8 billion, given cash and equivalents of $54.7 billion. Recent strategic initiatives, including the $5 million Shop Small Grants Program announced November 12, 2025, reinforce the company's differentiated premium card strategy and small business focus.
